title: JoyCat Alphabet Water Colouring Book for Toddlers 3-5, Reusable 14 Activity Pages with Water Pen for Mess Free Colouring, Preschool Alphabet Learning Letter Tracing Toys, Birthday Gift Boys Girls
features: Bigger Size, More Pages: Experience our expansive format! This jumbo water coloring book features 14 full-sized pages, measuring a generous 8.66 x 8.66 inches. Compared to other versions, this larger canvas gives little toddler artists more room to paint and explore, significantly extending playtime and engagement for the best value available

Engaging Alphabet Learning: Turn letter practice into play! This reusable water book is designed for early learners, covering all 26 uppercase and lowercase letters. Each letter features clear, step-by-step tracing guides to teach correct stroke order. Paired with "A is for Apple" style image association and the spelled-out word, it helps build a strong connection between letters, sounds, and meanings

Discover Hidden Surprises on Every Page: The magic goes beyond the letters! As your child paints with the water pen, they'll reveal a full, hidden surprise scene on every page (like animals or nature). This "seek-and-find" element boosts toddler curiosity and makes learning an exciting, screen-free adventure they'll want to experience repeatedly

The Ultimate On-the-Go, No-Clean-Up Activity: The perfect travel companion for your toddler! This water coloring activity is 100% mess-free, using only clean water—no paints, no chemicals, and no stains. The book comes with a built-in carrying handle and a dedicated pen pouch, making it ideal for keeping kids happily occupied during travel

Reusable & Eco-Friendly: Watch the magic disappear as pages dry, then start fresh for new adventures! This reusable water book is designed for repeated use, offering lasting value that outshines disposable activity pads. It's the eco-friendly choice that grows with your child—more durable than regular coloring books, more engaging, and made to last
description: Product Description Previous page Mess Free Painting Set Portable and Travel-friendly Reusable Coloring Book Next page Previous page Next page 1 Travel Essential 2 Home Essential 3 Perfect Gift Choice Are the pages prone to peeling or warping? We have upgraded based on user feedback! Using a more durable coating and thicker paper effectively prevents peeling and warping. Does the water pen run out quickly? How well does it work? We've redesigned the pen. The new version provides smoother water flow and larger capacity, requiring fewer refills for better experience. What learning activities are included? Your toddler can trace letters, magically reveal hidden images, and play matching games! This water book explores letters, animals, nature, and objects for educational fun. What are the actual dimensions? Measures 8.66 x 8.66 inches with 14 thick pages - larger than most similar books, offering more coloring space and longer playtime. Is this suitable as a gift? Absolutely! With attractive packaging, educational value, and mess-free design, it's a popular gift choice. Includes carrying handle and pen pouch, ready to gift.
